flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Greenville Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Greenville Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Greenville Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Greenville Technical College rose 54% between 2021 and 2024 (13.5% → 20.9%).
